basic_details.job_title: STCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Dy Manager and Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative (STCL) Dy Manager (Marketing) and Associate (Operation) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of STCL. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the STCL Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts. Age will be calculated as on 31 March 2026. Relaxation may be given to highly deserving candidates.

qualification.details: Dy Manager (Marketing): Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing discipline as major subject. Minimum 8 years' experience in marketing, with at least 3 years in a middle level position having proven success in a two-sided marketplace or platform business. Associate (Operation): Graduate from an institution/university of repute. Minimum 3 years' experience. Experience in ride hailing organisation will be given preference.

salary_details.details: Dy Manager (Marketing): Approx Rs 14.50 LPA (HRA as per POP) Associate (Operation): Approx Rs 5 LPA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for STCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: STCL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the STCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download STCL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Dy Manager (Marketing): Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing discipline as major subject. Minimum 8 years' experience in marketing, with at least 3 years in a middle level position having proven success in a two-sided marketplace or platform business. Associate (Operation): Graduate from an institution/university of repute. Minimum 3 years' experience. Experience in ride hailing organisation will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts. Age will be calculated as on 31 March 2026. Relaxation may be given to highly deserving candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Dy Manager (Marketing): Approx Rs 14.50 LPA (HRA as per POP) Associate (Operation): Approx Rs 5 LPA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for STCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for STCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for STCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 21 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in STCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 11 vacancies have been released under the STCL Recruitment 2026. These include posts for Dy Manager (Marketing) and Associate (Operation) across various categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for STCL Various Posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for STCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for STCL Dy Manager (Marketing) and Associate (Operation) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts under STCL Recruitment 2026 is 40 years. Age will be calculated as on 31 March 2026, and relaxation may be given to highly deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for Dy Manager (Marketing) post?
faq.answer: For Dy Manager (Marketing), candidates need Graduation with a full-time Master's Degree/Executive MBA/Post Graduate Diploma (2-years) in Marketing, plus minimum 8 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Associate (Operation) post?
faq.answer: The approximate salary for the Associate (Operation) post in STCL Recruitment 2026 is Rs 5 LPA. Detailed salary structure and benefits will be as per the organization's norms.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for STCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for STCL Recruitment 2026. Candidates from all categories, including General/OBC and SC/ST, are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for STCL Various Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for STCL Various Posts primarily involves an Email Application. Candidates will likely be shortlisted based on their applications, followed by further selection rounds as per the organization's discretion.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for STCL Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for STCL Recruitment 2026 can be found on the official website of Sahakar Taxi Cooperative, www.bharattaxiapp.com. It is essential to download and read it carefully before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative?
faq.answer: The official website for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative (STCL) is www.bharattaxiapp.com. Candidates can visit this website for more information regarding the organization and the recruitment process.
